features.name: Tranquility
features.description:
A creature within 5 feet of you must make a DC 8 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is charmed by you for 1 minute.

If the creature is a beast, it has advantage on its next attack roll against you.

features.name: Way of the Four Elements
features.description:
You gain the ability to channel the elements. When you make a spell attack, you can choose one of the following effects:

* You create a burst of air that knocks the target prone.

* You create a burst of water that extinguishes flames on a creature it hits.

* You create a burst of fire that deals 1d10 fire damage to the target.

* You create a burst of earth that causes the ground within 5 feet of you to become difficult terrain for creatures with a large size or larger.

* You create a burst of cold that deals 1d8 cold damage to the target.

* You can choose to make no effect, and then you use your bonus action to add your proficiency bonus to an attack roll.

*At level 4, when casting elemental spells, your spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13).
features.name: Discipline of the Elements
features.description: You can choose a creature within range. The target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, you deal necrotic damage to the target equal to your level plus the Wisdom modifier of the spellcasting monk. A creature that fails this saving throw becomes charmed by you for 1 minute. After using this feature once per day, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.
features.name: Quivering Palm
features.description: You gain the ability to sense the vibrations of creatures within 30 feet. When you hit a creature with an unarmed strike, you can spend 3 ki points to make the creature feel as though it has been struck by a small, invisible fist. The target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is charmed by you for 1 minute. A creature that fails this saving throw becomes disoriented and its speed is halved until the start of your next turn. After using this feature once per day, you can't use it again until you finish a short or long rest.
features.name: Vibrations
features.description: You gain the ability to sense the vibrations in creatures' bodies. Creatures that you touch with your ki have a unique vibration associated with their body. These vibrations are imperceptible unless you use an action to make them visible or audible. You can use this feature once per day, after which you must finish a short or long rest before it can be used again.
features.name: Vibrations (Imperceptible)
features.description: You can sense the vibrations in creatures' bodies without using an action. Creatures that you touch with your ki have unique vibrations associated with their body.
features.name: Discipline of Shadow
features.description: At level 17, when casting elemental spells, your spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15). Additionally, you gain proficiency in the skills Stealth, Deception, and Sleight of Hand. You can use your bonus action to create an illusion that lasts for up to 1 minute.
features.name: Shadow Arts
features.description: At level 21, when casting elemental spells, your spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15). Additionally, you gain proficiency in the skills Stealth, Deception, and Sleight of Hand. You can use your bonus action to create an illusion that lasts for up to 1 minute.
features.name: Shadow Step
features.description: At level 25, you gain the ability to teleport up to 60 feet to a shadowy location within dim light or darkness. The area that you end up in must be unoccupied and not difficult terrain. You can use this feature once per day, after which you must finish a short or long rest before it can be used again.
features.name: Shadow Arts (Enhanced Spellcasting)
features.description: At level 29, when casting elemental spells, your spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15). Additionally, you gain proficiency in the skills Stealth, Deception, and Sleight of Hand. You can use your bonus action to create an illusion that lasts for up to 1 minute.
features.name: Discipline of Shadow (Ninja)
features.description: At level 33, when casting elemental spells, your spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15). Additionally, you gain proficiency in the skills Stealth, Deception, and Sleight of Hand. You can use your bonus action to create an illusion that lasts for up to 1 minute.

features.description: At level 37, when casting elemental spells, your spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15). Additionally, you gain proficiency in the skills Stealth, Deception, and Sleight of Hand. You can use your bonus action to create an illusion that lasts for up to 1 minute.

features.description: At level 45, you gain the ability to teleport up to 60 feet to a shadowy location within dim light or darkness. The area that you end up in must be unoccupied and not difficult terrain. You can use this feature once per day, after which you must finish a short or long rest before it can be used again.
features.name: Cloak of Shadows
features.description: At level 49, when you are in an area of dim light or darkness, you can become invisible. You remain invisible until you make a melee attack, cast a spell, or move into bright light.
features.name: Discipline of Shadow
features.description: At level 53, when casting elemental spells, your spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15). Additionally, you gain proficiency in the skills Stealth, Deception, and Sleight of Hand. You can use your bonus action to create an illusion that lasts for up to 1 minute.

The area that you end up in must be unoccupied and not difficult terrain. You can use this feature once per day, after which you must finish a short or long rest before it can be used again.

features.name: Way of the Four Elements
features.description:
You gain the ability to channel the elements. When you make a spell attack, you can choose one of the following effects:

* You create a burst of air that knocks the target prone.

* You create a burst of water that extinguishes flames on a creature it hits.

* You create a burst of fire that deals 1d10 fire damage to the target.

* You create a burst of earth that causes the ground within 5 feet of you to become difficult terrain for creatures with a large size or larger.

* You create a burst of cold that deals 1d8 cold damage to the target.

* You can choose to make no effect, and then you use your bonus action to add your proficiency bonus to an attack roll.

*At level 3, when casting elemental spells, your spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 10).
